description: Protocol-level benchmark hooks for the Hawk High Foundry repo. These are expected hypothesis classes, not confirmed bug claims.

expected_hypotheses.description: Configuration or threshold variables should be enforced in production control flow.
Distribution or payout math should conserve funds across dynamic recipients.
Upgrade authorization and execution lifecycle should be reachable, authorized, and testable.
Related upgradeable versions should preserve compatible storage layout.
Public lifecycle or payout flows should not depend on unbounded dynamic array iteration.
